ai_governance_bridge.boundary: Cassandra is not an AI monitor and does not inspect models.
ai_governance_bridge.role: Sample public governance-artifact case study for the evidence discipline that AI governance will need.

case_study_sentence: Cassandra: from governance infrastructure to evidence infrastructure.
caveat: Public observatory data for Cassandra structural observation only; not trusted-list validation, legal-status determination, supervision, signature validation, relying-party processing, or public alerting.

asserts: Cassandra records dated structural observation telemetry over local LOTL-derived artifacts.
EATF receipts, when status is ok, verify the corresponding package envelope and payload bytes.
does_not_assert: legal effect of any trusted list

runs.caveat: Aggregate structural-observation telemetry only; not trusted-list validation, supervision, legal-status determination, signature verification, public alerting, or publication approval.
